# ConfigClarity
> Free browser-based sysadmin audit tools. No signup. No backend. Everything runs in your browser.

## Tools

### Cron Job Overlap Checker & Visualiser
URL: https://configclarity.dev/
Build cron expressions visually or paste a full crontab. Detects job overlaps on a 24-hour timeline. Useful for sysadmins and homelab users managing multiple scheduled tasks.

### SSL Certificate Expiry Checker
URL: https://configclarity.dev/ssl
Paste multiple domains and check SSL certificate expiry in bulk. Color-coded status, wildcard detection, CDN domain warnings.

### Docker Compose Auditor
URL: https://configclarity.dev/docker
Paste a docker-compose.yml file and audit for missing healthchecks, hardcoded secrets, port collisions, and insecure 0.0.0.0 bindings.

### UFW Firewall Auditor
URL: https://configclarity.dev/firewall
Paste output of sudo ufw status verbose and audit for high-risk open ports, missing default-deny, conflicting rules, IPv4/IPv6 mismatches, and overly broad CIDR ranges.

### Reverse Proxy Flow Mapper
URL: https://configclarity.dev/proxy
Paste nginx.conf or a docker-compose.yml with Traefik labels. Visualises routing decisions, detects dangling routers, missing SSL redirects, and exposed admin routes.

## Technology
Client-side only. No data is stored or transmitted. Built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
